title: Monsoon Vietnamese Cannellini Bean Wrap
description: A floral and chewy Vietnamese dish featuring cannellini beans, served in a lotus leaf wrap, perfect for a macrobiotic friendly meal. This dish is inspired by the monsoon season in Vietnam.
instructions: Soak the lotus leaves in warm water for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Fill a large bowl with warm water and add the rice paper wrappers to soften them.
In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and fry the marinated tofu until golden brown.
In the same pan, add the pickled carrots and daikon and stir fry for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked cannellini beans to the pan and stir fry for another minute.
Assemble the wrap by placing a softened rice paper wrapper on a flat surface, then adding a few pieces of fried tofu, some pickled carrots and daikon, and a spoonful of cannellini beans.
Drizzle the monsoon Vietnamese sauce over the filling and sprinkle with fried shallots.
Wrap the filling in the rice paper wrapper and serve in a lotus leaf wrap.
Repeat the process to make the remaining wraps.
